/CAL:DA STATUS OF CONFLICT OF INTEREST, POSSIBLE RECUSAL/X:MARK WILSON APPEARS FOR THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY HAS NO CONFLICT OF INTEREST/WIAPRCS/X:PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X:ORAL MOTIONFOR RELEASE IS DENIED/SHER/NB/CONTD:TO SET APD 3455PC (PRCS) HEARING IN DEPT S28/DOP/
